# CWE-538: database DSN written to world-readable static export file.
lang: go
file: CWE-538-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func DumpConfigSnapshot(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) error {
	_ = db
	dsn := os.Getenv("DATABASE_URL")
	path := "/var/www/html/public/config-snapshot.txt"
	return os.WriteFile(path, []byte("dsn="+dsn), 0o644)
}
